title: Voting
description: Your Neurons earn rewards by participating in governance. You can vote yourself or delegate voting to a Representative.

noFollowing.title: No Representative selected
noFollowing.body: Following a Representative automates voting on proposals and helps ensure your Neuron earns voting rewards.

proposals.cta: Curious about what's being voted on?

warnings.stakeRequired: You need at least one Neuron to follow a Representative. Please stake ICP first.
warnings.followingMismatch: Your Stakes follow multiple Representatives across different topics, so a single Representative card can’t be shown yet.

errors.loadFollowing: Unable to load following data. Please try refreshing the page.
